queue_context.queue_name: routine pediatric therapy prior authorization review

environment_access.note: Use the shared service endpoints or the SQL query service. Internal environment files and database paths are not solver input.

local_memo.text: Please complete the reviewer disposition for CASE-TE-001 with the requested service line, applicable criteria results, current evidence documents, excluded record IDs, any additional information to request, the route, status, approved units, and response due date.
